# TYPE ramses_active_devices gauge

# TYPE ramses_message_rate gauge

# HELP ramses_message_processing_duration_seconds Time spent processing messages
# TYPE ramses_message_processing_duration_seconds histogram
ramses_message_processing_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.001"} 0.0
ramses_message_processing_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.005"} 0.0
ramses_message_processing_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.01"} 0.0
